text.title: RAG Pipeline Design — Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure: pick tier from query analysis → choose vector DB + embedding model → ingest + chunk → wire hybrid retrieval + reranker → install eval gate → ship.

step.name: pick-tier
step.input: ≥100 labelled query sample + latency / cost budgets
step.action: Cluster queries by complexity. Naive if single-intent FAQ; Advanced if ambiguous + needs rerank; Modular if ≥2 data sources; Agentic if multi-step reasoning required.
step.decision-gate: If reaching for Agentic on a single-intent FAQ — STOP; tier overshoot inflates cost without quality gain (r1-tier-selection).

step.name: choose-db-and-embedding
step.input: Operational profile (managed vs self-host, existing Postgres, scale, multi-tenant)
step.action: Pick vector DB: Qdrant (self-hosted default), pgvector (Postgres exists), Pinecone (managed serverless), Chroma (dev only). Pick embedding: Voyage-3-large (quality), text-embedding-3-small (cost), local BGE (privacy).
step.decision-gate: If embedding model could change in next 90 days — pin a version in spec; switching forces re-index.

step.name: ingest-and-chunk
step.action: Default RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter 400-512 / 50 overlap. Override only with document-type rationale (paragraph for legal, header-based for code, hierarchical for manuals). Compute content hashes; skip re-embed on unchanged docs.
step.output: Indexed collection + ingest report (chunks per doc, hash log)
step.decision-gate: If chunk size out of [100, 1500] band — require explicit comment in spec (r3-chunk-default).

step.name: wire-hybrid-and-rerank
step.action: Configure hybrid retrieval (vector + BM25 + RRF fusion). On tier ≠ naive add reranker (Cohere Rerank or BGE Reranker). Retrieve top-20, rerank to top-5.
step.output: retrieval + reranker blocks committed; p95 latency benchmarked
step.decision-gate: If p95 budget breached — drop reranker.top_n to 3 OR move to faster reranker; do not skip reranker (r4-reranker-after-retrieval).

step.name: install-eval-gate
step.input: ≥50 labelled QA pairs + chosen framework (Ragas / TruLens)
step.action: Add CI job that runs eval on every PR touching prompts / chunks / retrieval. Gate: faithfulness ≥ 0.9, context_recall ≥ 0.85. Block merge on regression.
step.output: CI job live; first eval-gate run report archived
step.decision-gate: If labelled set <50 pairs — STOP; expand the eval set before shipping (r6-eval-gate).

step.name: ship-and-instrument
step.action: Log query_embedding + retrieved_ids + scores per request. Wire telemetry to `retrieval-drift-alerting-recipe` for runtime monitoring. Roll out at 1% → 10% → 50% → 100% if no acceptance-contract breach.
step.output: Production pipeline live with telemetry feeding drift monitor
step.decision-gate: If telemetry missing query embedding logging — block production; drift detector is blind without it.
